name: Mercurial Scimitar

active.name: Quicksilver
active.effects: Removes all {{tip|crowd control}} debuffs (except {{tip|Airborne}}) from your champion and grants {{as|50% '''bonus total''' movement speed}} and {{tip|ghosted|ghosting}} for 2 seconds.

effects_structured.raw: Removes all crowd control debuffs except Airborne.
Gain 50% bonus total movement speed and ghosted for 2 seconds.

simpleDescription: Activate to remove all crowd control debuffs and grant massive Move Speed

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model: Quicksilver is a self-activated cleanse that removes most crowd-control effects but does not remove airborne effects.
Execution model: On successful activation, movement-speed bonus and Ghosting apply immediately for 2 seconds using a shared 90-second active cooldown.

sources.name: Data Dragon item dataset
sources.used_for: baseline item identity, stat block, and raw effect text

sources.used_for: secondary validation against canonical static item data mirror
local ingestion snapshot used during structured effect authoring
